data.title: Elon Musk Has A Frosty Relationship With Dad Errol But Last Year Gifted Him A Luxury Car That Was Surprisingly Not A Tesla — Here's Why
data.description: Despite their rocky relationship, Elon Musk gifted his father, Errol Musk, a Bentley Flying Spur last year instead of a Tesla, while also providing financial support to family members.

data.title: Bitcoin, Dogecoin Weak, Ethereum Rebounds Amid Muted Investor Sentiment: ETH Moving To Cold Wallets At 'Shocking Pace' A Positive For Price Action In The Long-Term
data.description: Bitcoin continued to move sideways on Monday, while Ethereum staged a rebound as investors resorted to a wait-and-watch approach.

data.title: Southwest Airlines To Slash 15% Of Workforce Amid Push For Profitability — 1,750 Corporate Roles Axed
data.description: Southwest Airlines Co. announced Monday it will eliminate approximately 1,750 corporate positions, marking the first large-scale layoff in the carrier's 53-year history as it seeks to streamline operations and boost profitability.

data.title: Chuck Schumer Blasts Trump FAA Layoffs After Delta Plane Overturns On Landing In Toronto: President Fired 'Safety Specialists'
data.description: Chuck Schumer criticized Trump's FAA layoffs after a Delta flight accident in Toronto on Monday, stressing the agency's safety role even for U.S. planes flying to Canada.

data.title: After Google Stands Firm On 'Gulf of America' Label, Mexico Says It's Waiting For A New Response Or 'Will Proceed To Court'
data.description: Mexico has warned it will take legal action against Google if the company does not restore "Gulf of Mexico" on its Maps service after renaming it "Gulf of America" for U.S. users.
